description.short: Tracks Microsoft Marketplace documentation changes and posts Teams digests.
description.full: Monitors Microsoft Learn Marketplace and Partner Center documentation, sends daily digests, and supports direct chat queries about partner and customer impact.

commands.title: history last 7 days
commands.description: Summarize stored Marketplace doc changes over a time window

commands.title: show diff
commands.description: Show old and new text for the latest observed change on a page

commands.title: sources
commands.description: List the Learn pages currently being tracked

commands.title: status
commands.description: Show bot version and monitoring status

commands.title: legend
commands.description: Explain the change card severity, icons, and attributes

commands.title: backfill last 30 days
commands.description: [Admin] Create inferred historical entries from Learn metadata
